title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz Life in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz Life:
Bajaj Allianz Life is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
